title: Colosseum Fighters Clear a Path
description: Pages 6–10 focus on colosseum fighters clear a path, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the active characters in this part.
scene: This part follows Unknown person #1, Colosseum Announcer, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6 as luffy's allies push up the new plateau while Pica, Doflamingo's officers, and the Birdcage turn Dressrosa into a battlefield.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Get off already!! You're weighing UCY DOWN!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Ah, I haven't intro- duced myself properly yet. My name is JEET.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: And the large fellow behind me !!!!is...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Luffy, it looks like his head up there is just a piece of rock!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: And the place we're standing right now is just rock, too!! Like a statue!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: His real body is over there!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: Finally, you show your real human face.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: Ahhhh!!! He pulled out a giant sword!! Dodge!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: If you can't dodge then stop!! Bull!!

summary: Colosseum Fighters Clear a Path develops the chapter's Dressrosa conflict through Unknown person #1, Colosseum Announcer, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, while preserving the OCR dialogue and keeping unclear speakers readable.
